title: The Academy Table Podcast: A Conversation with Judy Faulkner | Epic

# The Academy Table Podcast: A Conversation with Judy Faulkner

September 18, 2021

Judy shares from her years of leadership experience about her thoughts on the future of healthcare, future orientation for decision-making, and making a difference with the culture inside your organization.

[](https://www.linkedin.com/shareArticle?url=https://www.epic.com/epic/post/the-academy-table-podcast-a-conversation-with-judy-faulkner "Share on LinkedIn") [](https://www.facebook.com/sharer.php?u=https://www.epic.com/epic/post/the-academy-table-podcast-a-conversation-with-judy-faulkner "Share on Facebook") [](https://x.com/share?url=https://www.epic.com/epic/post/the-academy-table-podcast-a-conversation-with-judy-faulkner&text=The Academy Table Podcast: A Conversation with Judy Faulkner @HeyEpic "Share on X") [](https://bsky.app/intent/compose?text=The Academy Table Podcast: A Conversation with Judy Faulkner https://www.epic.com/epic/post/the-academy-table-podcast-a-conversation-with-judy-faulkner @hey.epic.com "Share on Blue Sky")

In this episode, Judy Faulkner, founder and CEO of Epic, brings her philosophy of, “you have to laugh to learn” to The Table. Judy shares from her years of leadership experience about her thoughts on the future of healthcare, future orientation for decision-making, and making a difference with the culture inside your organization.

Listen [here](https://www.theacademytable.com/s2ep12-visionary-thinking-featuring-judy-faulkner/) or on your favorite streaming app.
